and of course!!! they're so so shaped especially in your artstyle

Gotta stop his brother from fighting the jenkins/a child

oh yeah absolutely 

I wonder what led to Pollux being 0.3 seconds from attacking Jenkin? is this the aftermath of that time she stole something of castor's, lol? (for context I'm referencing one of the stories you unlock from affinity with Pollux)

either is very plausible

bird vs mouse situation

meanwhile Jenkins with full gremlin energy glares back at him
if I had the energy I'd make a comic of this but alas

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Axy5dIAik9TsMXOML5U6GL_83OfvIgbFzN72E8JR8kU/edit?usp=sharing

*Endowed with iniquitous providence, she is the one who can reforge life from lifelessness. This sanctimonious priestess shall prevail through all trials and tribulations.*

Beynge greatly appreciative of Sophia's role in the story, and knowing as it is that her role in it was yet incomplete - thus, I took it upon myself to fully-conceptualize an Awakener kit for her. Predominantly based-upon the aforementioned role in the narrative, as well as Chapter 7 and my own fiction.

Realm: Caro
Role: Assault
Main Stat and Sub Stat: Realm Mastery and Crit Rate
[Sub-damage, Counter damage, Realm Mastery scaling, Pursuit synergy, Form Transformation]

Thank thee for readynge. <:approved:1356053028787982558> 
UID: 100748055
